---
title: "IS428 Project"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
[Visual Analytics]{.hero-kicker}

## A clean project website built with Quarto

Use this homepage as the landing page for your project. The navigation bar links to separate pages, so `Proposal`, `Methodology`, and `Poster` each render as their own proper HTML file.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Open Proposal](proposal.qmd)
[Open Methodology](methodology.qmd)
[Open Poster](poster.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.page-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Proposal

Outline the problem statement, objectives, project scope, and expected outcome.

[Go to proposal](proposal.qmd){.cta-link}
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Methodology

Describe your dataset, workflow, analysis process, and visual analytics approach.

[Go to methodology](methodology.qmd){.cta-link}
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Poster

Use this page to summarize the final visuals, key findings, and conclusion.

[Go to poster](poster.qmd){.cta-link}
:::
:::

::: {.page-intro}
[How it works]{.muted-label}

This website is built from separate `.qmd` files and configured through `_quarto.yml`. When you render the project, Quarto converts each page into its own HTML file and keeps the top navigation in sync across the site.
:::
